title: Its the year of our lord 2022 and I have finally watched Evangelion
display_title: Its the year of our lord 2022 and I have finally watched Evangelion
wikitext:
[]: It's the year of our lord 2022 and I have *finally* watched Evangelion.             Quote Post by BossFight » Thu Sep 22, 2022 11:57 am [quote][/quote] What are the major analysis/fan theories/etc I should read up on to catch up with the current state of the fandom? Also I have thoughts if anyone is interested

[]: Re: It's the year of our lord 2022 and I have *finally* watched Evangelion.             Quote Post by WDS » Wed Sep 28, 2022 9:15 pm Oh god, where do we even start? First of all, Misato did NOT kill Kaji, and Unit 00 does NOT contain the soul of Ritsuko's mom. I think those are the most important ideas to squash.
